title: Adorable Pink Baby Rattles (6cm) 6 Count - Party Favors for Baby Showers & Celebrations
features: ADORABLE BABY RATTLES: These charming pink rattles, designed with intricate details, are perfect for stimulating your baby's senses, ensuring endless fun and entertainment for your little one.

PRETTY PINK DESIGN: The soft, pastel pink color adds an extra touch of cuteness to these rattles, making them an ideal choice for baby girls and a wonderful addition to pink-themed baby showers or celebrations.
PERFECT SIZE FOR TINY HANDS: At 6cm in length, these baby rattles are specifically crafted to comfortably fit your baby's grasp, promoting fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination.
SET OF 6 RATTLES: This pack includes 6 rattles, ensuring you'll have plenty to share as party favors during baby showers or other gatherings, or even keep as backup for your own little one.

PERFECT BABY SHOWER PARTY FAVOR: These adorable pink baby rattles serve as a delightful way to commemorate a special occasion, and allow guests to take home a memento of your baby shower or celebration, creating cherished memories for years to come.
description: Product Description Thank all the guests who came to your party and send them home with these party favors featuring pink rattles designed with a star. Your guests will be thrilled to take home these party favors as a memento of your occasion. Box Contains 1 X 6 Baby Rattle 2.5'' Pink Favour Pack
